evidence_notes: Actual repaired SVGs were read from pipeline/iconforge/assets/svg/owned_repair_batch59/ in the detached copy.
Candidate day/dusk/night renders were read from pipeline/iconforge/out/standard_repair_batch51/renders and OpenCPN/source-variant references from pipeline/iconforge/out.
Each verdict was checked against pipeline/iconforge/catalog/standard_source_table.json row metadata plus the standard_judge_batch_015 required_change that selected this tower repair family.
The batch59 repair replaces prior diamond/daymark placeholders with tapered tower silhouette candidates carrying row colour and pattern semantics.
TOWERS55, TOWERS94, and TOWERS97 were not promoted because their diagonal stripe render geometry protrudes outside the tower silhouette/body.
TOWERS74|;TX(OBJNAM was not promoted because the exact OpenCPN/source render witness is absent in this detached copy; the sanitized candidate path exists as TOWERS74_TX_OBJNAM.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only and grant zero final approvals.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals
selection.selection_note: Judged owned_repair_batch59 against row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57 shape/color/pattern conditions, source/provider references, repaired SVGs, prior judge15 failure text, and available candidate/reference renders. Scope is exactly the 58 repaired TOWERS silhouette rows in owned_repair_batch59.
